name: refhub-paper-drafter
description: Draft HCI and visualization research papers from scattered notes and a RefHub vault. Grounded, structured, and modeled on best-paper-award exemplars — with interactive scaffolding, source-map grounding, writing quality review, and an adversarial R2 reviewer loop.

interface.shortDescription: Draft HCI and visualization papers from your notes
interface.longDescription: Takes your scattered notes and RefHub vault entries and produces a grounded manuscript draft modeled on best practices from award-winning HCI and visualization research. Includes interactive scaffolding, source-map grounding (no hallucinated claims), writing quality review, and an adversarial R2 reviewer loop. Outputs Markdown or functional LaTeX to session, local file, or Overleaf via Git bridge.
defaultPrompt: Draft a paper from my notes and vault
Run R2 review on my paper draft
